description_long: This motorcycle features a rugged, custom design with large, knobby off-road tires and a matte black frame. The most striking element is the prominent animal skull with large, curved horns mounted on the front, giving it a distinctive, aggressive appearance. The seat is contoured and appears to be made of leather or a similar material, while the exhaust pipes are angled upward and finished in metallic silver. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, with visible hand grips and controls. The frame includes exposed mechanical components and a reinforced undercarriage, suggesting durability for rough terrain. The overall aesthetic is reminiscent of a post-apocalyptic or custom chopper style, blending utilitarian function with bold, intimidating visual elements.
description: A custom, matte black motorcycle with large off-road tires and a dramatic animal skull with horns mounted on the front, featuring exposed mechanical parts and upward-angled exhausts.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the animal skull on the front, the contoured seat, and the upward-angled exhaust pipes.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide rear tire, dual exhausts, and the narrow seat tapering toward the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the frame, engine, and the animal skull from a different angle, with the exhausts and seat clearly visible.
description_view_3: Front view dominated by the large animal skull and horns, with the front tire and handlebars visible behind the skull.
